summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Daily.co video conferencing integration in 'The Room' discipleship app. All backend video room API endpoints working correctly (10/10 tests passed). Frontend VideoRoom component renders on NOW tab with Join Video Room button, video controls, attendance tracking, and alternative Zoom link. Daily.co integration successfully creates/joins persistent rooms per lesson.
passed_tests: Backend: Video status endpoint requires authentication (403)
Backend: Join video endpoint requires authentication (403)
Backend: Member can get video room status (200)
Backend: Teacher can get video room status (200)
Backend: Member can join video room and receive room_url + meeting_token
Backend: Teacher can join video room with owner privileges
Backend: Non-existent lesson returns 404 for video join
Backend: Non-existent lesson returns 404 for video status
Backend: Video join records 'joined_video' attendance action
Backend: Room name follows 'lesson-{lessonId[:8]}' format
Frontend: Login with Quick Demo Login button works
Frontend: VideoRoom component renders on NOW tab
Frontend: 'Join Video Room' button visible and clickable
Frontend: Video room successfully connects to Daily.co
Frontend: Video controls appear (camera, mic, screenshare, expand, leave)
Frontend: Participant count badge shows '1 person in the room'
Frontend: 'You've joined video!' attendance confirmation shown
Frontend: Leave call button works and returns to join state
Frontend: External Zoom Meeting alternative link available
Frontend: Live Chat link visible on NOW tab
seed_data_creation: Used existing seed data - lessons available with zoom_link configured
context_for_next_testing_agent: Daily.co video integration fully tested. VideoRoom component at /app/frontend/src/components/VideoRoom.jsx uses @daily-co/daily-js and @daily-co/daily-react. Backend endpoints POST /api/lessons/{lesson_id}/video/join and GET /api/lessons/{lesson_id}/video/status implemented in DailyService class. Room naming: 'lesson-{lessonId[:8]}'. Attendance action 'joined_video' recorded when user joins. External Zoom link works as alternative via 'Join Zoom' button.
